title: Onyx Headphone — Bone
summary: Onyx headphone in bone; built in Japan for daily use.

content.text:
# Onyx Headphone — Bone

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Onyx Headphone — Bone is designed for the long haul, with audio-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Japan.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
